REPLY MEMORANDUM IN SUPPORT OF ITS MOTION FOR STAY OF ENFORCEMENT OF THE JUDGMENT OF POSSESSION FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

(RULING CON'T FROM ABOVE) THE COURT CONCLUDES THAT THE PRIMARY FACTOR TO CONSIDER IS HARDSHIP; THE COURT MUST WEIGH THE BURDEN PLACED ON DEFENDANT AND THE HUNDREDS OF DISABLED PERSONS VERSUS THE BURDEN PLACED ON THE PLAINTIFF. THE COURT HOLDS THAT THE HARDSHIP PLACED ON DEFENDANT AND THE SEVERAL HUNDRED DISABLED PERSONS OUTWEIGHS THE HARDSHIP IMPOSED ON PLAINTIFF. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT GRANTS THE STAY UNTIL MARCH 1, 1999. DEFENDANT, CITY & COUNTY OF S.F, SHALL REMIT TO PLAINTIFF THE REASONABLE RENTAL VALUE OF THE PREMISES THROUGH MARCH 1, 1999.
